Therapies: Suctioning - As Needed (Discharge) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was receiving suctioning therapy as needed. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
587 TRCHOSTM_ADMSN_CD TRCHOSTM_ADMSN_CD Therapies: Tracheostomy Care (Admission) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was receiving tracheostomy care. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
588 TRCHOSTM_DSCHRG_CD TRCHOSTM_DSCHRG_CD
